reviews.comment:
El 01 de diciembre de 2017, se ha cambiado el concesionario de esta estación de servicios. Verdaderamente han realizado un gran esfuerzo para ponerla a punto nuevamente. Es la parada obligada en el viaje entre Posadas y Corrientes capital.

(Translated by Google)
On December 1, 2017, the concessionaire of this service station changed. They have truly made a great effort to get it up and running again. It's a must-stop on the trip between Posadas and Corrientes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnX2R2UDhnRRAB
